title: pfaffia acutifolia
intro: Pfaffia acutifolia, also known as suma, is a plant species native to the Amazon region of South America, particularly in Brazil. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Pfaffia acutifolia include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Pfaffia acutifolia include capsules, tablets, and teas, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
